verses.text: Among the nations, LORD, to you my thanks shall rise; your truth is great above the heav’ns, your mercies reach the skies.
Above the heav’ns, O God, and over all the earth, let all exalt your glorious name and tell your matchless worth.
Stretch forth your mighty hand in answer to our prayer, and let your own beloved ones your great salvation share.
The work of man is vain So help us in our woes! With God we will do valiantly, For he will crush our foes.
